name: cloze_prose_advanced
description: Advanced expression mining for prose/article style text.
system_prompt: You are a language-learning content editor. Output a JSON array only. Do not output explanations or code fences. For each candidate, use 1-2 phrase_types from: metaphor_imagery, stance_positioning, concession_contrast, discourse_organizer, abstraction_bridge, reusable_high_frequency_chunk, phrasal_verb, strong_collocation. Also include expression_transfer as one short transfer-oriented usage hint (<=120 chars), not a translation.

user_prompt_template.en: source_lang={source_lang} target_lang={target_lang} document_title={document_title} source_url={source_url} learning_mode={learning_mode} difficulty={difficulty} cloze_max_sentences={cloze_max_sentences} cloze_min_chars={cloze_min_chars} cloze_max_per_chunk={cloze_max_per_chunk} You will receive one or more chunks in this format: chunk_id=chunk_0001 chunk_text=\n Return a JSON array. Each item MUST include: { "chunk_id": "matching chunk id", "text": "cloze sentence(s)", "original": "plain text without cloze markers/html", "target_phrases": ["phrase 1", "phrase 2"], "note_hint": "optional hint" } Optional debug fields are allowed: - "selection_reason": short reason why this candidate is selected - "phrase_types": array of labels - "learning_value_score": numeric score - "expression_transfer": short transfer-oriented hint Global requirements: 1) text must contain at least one cloze: {{cN::PHRASE}}(hint). 2) cN index increases by appearance order in each text. 3) original must not contain cloze markers or html. 4) use ... for emphasis, do NOT use markdown **. 5) omit candidates shorter than cloze_min_chars or exceeding cloze_max_sentences. 6) if no suitable candidate exists, return an empty array. Material profile: prose_article. Advanced rubric: - Prefer high-information expressions: semantic turns, abstract collocations, nuanced framing. - Usually 2-3 clozes per candidate when natural. - Reject low-value targets like "think if", "this data or that data", or generic fillers. - Every candidate should include at least one non-trivial multiword target. 10) For difficulty=advanced, include `phrase_types` with 1-2 labels chosen only from this taxonomy: metaphor_imagery, stance_positioning, concession_contrast, discourse_organizer, abstraction_bridge, reusable_high_frequency_chunk, phrasal_verb, strong_collocation. 11) For difficulty=advanced, include `expression_transfer` as one short transfer hint (<=120 chars) focused on reusable discourse function; use an empty string when unclear. 12) Advanced expression is not the same as rare words; prioritize discourse-level, stance-level, and transfer-ready chunks. 13) If a segment contains both a common phrasal verb and a higher-value concession/discourse organizer, prefer the latter. chunk_text: {chunk_text}
user_prompt_template.zh: source_lang={source_lang} target_lang={target_lang} document_title={document_title} source_url={source_url} learning_mode={learning_mode} difficulty={difficulty} cloze_max_sentences={cloze_max_sentences} cloze_min_chars={cloze_min_chars} cloze_max_per_chunk={cloze_max_per_chunk} 你将收到丈多个 chunk，格式下： chunk_id=chunk_0001 chunk_text=\n 请返?JSON 数组。每丅素必须包吼 { "chunk_id": "对应?chunk id", "text": "包含 cloze 的句子", "original": "不含 cloze 标?html 的纯文本", "target_phrases": ["1", "2"], "note_hint": "叉提示" } 允附加调试字： - "selection_reason": 该选中的简矐由 - "phrase_types": 标数组 - "learning_value_score": 数评分 全局要求： 1) text 必须至少包含?cloze：{{cN::}}(提示)。 2) 同一?text ?cN 按出现顺序。 3) original 不得包含 cloze 标?html。 4) 叻使用 ... 强调，不要使?markdown **。 5) 丢弃长度小于 cloze_min_chars 或句子数超过 cloze_max_sentences 的 6) 若没有合适内容，返回空数组 材料类型：prose_article。 难度规范（advanced）： - 优先高信息度表达：诹轊、抽象搭配细徫场架 - 在自然前提下通常每条 2-3 ?cloze。 - 拒绝低价值目标，?think if、this data or that data、泛化填充。 - 每条至少包含丝平庸多词盠。 10) For difficulty=advanced, include `phrase_types` with 1-2 labels chosen only from this taxonomy: metaphor_imagery, stance_positioning, concession_contrast, discourse_organizer, abstraction_bridge, reusable_high_frequency_chunk, phrasal_verb, strong_collocation. 11) For difficulty=advanced, include `expression_transfer` as one short transfer hint (<=120 chars) focused on reusable discourse function; use an empty string when unclear. 12) Advanced expression is not the same as rare words; prioritize discourse-level, stance-level, and transfer-ready chunks. 13) If a segment contains both a common phrasal verb and a higher-value concession/discourse organizer, prefer the latter. chunk_text: {chunk_text}
